name: io.github.brajendrak00068/levea-mcp-server
description: Autonomous AI video editor over MCP: viral clips, captions, reframe, chroma key, MP4 export

environmentVariables.name: LEVEA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Levea API base URL, e.g. https://api.livecore.ai

environmentVariables.name: LEVEA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Levea API key. Generate one at https://studio.livecore.ai/
